# nullplatform_deployment_strategy (Resource)

The deployment_strategy resource allows you to manage nullplatform Deployment Strategies

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    nullplatform = {
      source = "nullplatform/nullplatform"
    }
  }
}

provider "nullplatform" {}

variable "nrn" {
  description = "The NRN the deployment strategy applies to"
  type        = string
}

resource "nullplatform_deployment_strategy" "rolling" {
  name        = "rolling-update"
  description = "Rolling update strategy for production scopes"
  nrn         = var.nrn

  dimensions = jsonencode({
    environment = "production"
  })

  parameters = jsonencode({
    max_unavailable = 1
    max_surge       = 1
  })

  scope_type_ids = []
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the deployment strategy.

### Optional

- `account` (String) The slug of the account NRN component.
- `application` (String) The slug of the application NRN component.
- `description` (String) A description of the deployment strategy.
- `dimensions` (String) JSON string containing the dimensions the strategy applies to.
- `namespace` (String) The slug of the namespace NRN component.
- `nrn` (String) A system-wide unique ID representing the resource.
- `parameters` (String) JSON string containing the strategy parameters.
- `scope` (String) The slug of the scope NRN component.
- `scope_type_ids` (List of String) List of scope type IDs this strategy is restricted to.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp of the deployment strategy.
- `created_by` (String) The user that created the deployment strategy.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String) The last update timestamp of the deployment strategy.
- `updated_by` (String) The user that last updated the deployment strategy.
